Class AbstractEventModelSequenceTrainer

java.lang.Object
opennlp.tools.ml.AbstractTrainer
opennlp.tools.ml.AbstractEventModelSequenceTrainer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Trainer, EventModelSequenceTrainer<Event>
Direct Known Subclasses:
SimplePerceptronSequenceTrainer
public abstract class AbstractEventModelSequenceTrainer extends AbstractTrainer implements EventModelSequenceTrainer<Event>
A basic EventModelSequenceTrainer implementation that processes events.
